name: Azusa Murasaka
description:
She is one of Naho's best friend who supports her throughout the series. She is often seen arguing with Hagita, but has a cheerful personality.

Azusa is shown to be cheerful, playful, bright, and kind to her friends. She accepted many of the nicknames she received in middle school, proving her to be open-minded to most things. Though, she may be mischievous at times.
